failure_signature: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: Dependency upgrade/metadata changes are present, but no concrete intermittent flaky signature is provided in the case data.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR primarily upgrades `grpc-go` and updates dependency metadata. The case data does not include a concrete intermittent failure signature or a targeted stabilization change, so keep it as needs-more-evidence instead of guessing a test-infra migration root cause.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: files: ddl/ddl.go, go.mod, go.sum, owner/fail_test.go, store/tikv/test_util.go, tools/check/go.mod
